title: ZimaBoard 2 Review: Set Up Your Own AI Server (And Run OpenClaw!)
summary: Jordan Urbs reviews the ZimaBoard 2, a small form-factor server designed for running AI workloads locally. The video covers hardware setup, Zima OS dashboard, deploying OpenClaw (a community fork of leaked Cloud Code), wiring it to Venice AI, and building a Telegram bot that delivers a daily 10am AI news briefing using Apify for web scraping.
